texts.desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and you control a "Witchcrafter" monster other than "Witchcrafter Seed", or "Regulus, the Prince of Endymion": You can target 1 face-up card on the field; return it to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY; reveal any number of cards in your hand, including a Spell, and shuffle them into the Deck, then draw that many cards. You can only use each effect of "Witchcrafter Seed" once per turn.
texts.name: Witchcrafter Seed
